name: GraniteShares 3x Long GAFAM Daily ETC
summary: GraniteShares 3x Long GAFAM Daily ETC is an exchange-traded commodity (ETC) designed to provide investors with a leveraged return based on the performance of GAFAM stocks (Google, Apple, Facebook, Amazon, Microsoft). The ETC aims to deliver three times the daily performance of the GAFAM stocks. The issuer is GraniteShares.
